heading: Program
label: 3057k–11 Program
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 641 and is classified to section 3057 of this title.section 631 of Pub. L. 89–73l
Amendments2020—Subsec. (b). substituted “(c), (d), and (f)” for “(c), (d), and (e)”.Pub. L. 116–131
amendments: Amendments2020—Subsec. (b). substituted “(c), (d), and (f)” for “(c), (d), and (e)”.Pub. L. 116–131

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Assistant Secretary shall carry out a program for making grants to tribal organizations with applications approved under parts A and B, to pay for the Federal share of carrying out tribal programs, to enable the tribal organizations to provide multifaceted systems of the support services described in for caregivers described in .section 3030s–1 of this titlesection 3030s–1 of this title

children.heading: Requirements
children.label: b Requirements
children.text: In providing services under subsection (a), a tribal organization shall meet the requirements specified for an area agency on aging and for a State in the provisions of subsections (c), (d), and (f) of and of . For purposes of this subsection, references in such provisions to a State program shall be considered to be references to a tribal program under this part.section 3030s–1 of this titlesection 3030s–2 of this title
